title.description: Heading of the notifications modal/dialog; also the accessible name of the notification bell.

bell.label.description: Accessible label for the notification bell when there are no unread notifications.

bell.labelWithUnread.description: Accessible label for the notification bell with unread items. {count} = number of unread notifications.

bell.relatedLabel.description: Accessible label for an inline notification bell (next to a resource title) with no unread items.

bell.relatedLabelWithUnread.description: Accessible label for an inline notification bell with unread items. {count} = number of unread notifications.

permission.tooltip.description: Popover prompt encouraging the user to grant browser-notification permission. 'Namefi Webapp' is the product name.

permission.enable.description: Button that requests browser-notification permission (enables OS banners).

permission.ctaText.description: Inline banner inside the notifications modal explaining the benefit of enabling browser notifications (OS banners).

modal.description.description: Screen-reader-only description of the notifications dialog, explaining the available controls.

list.filters.description: Toggle button that shows/hides the notification filter controls.

list.refresh.description: Accessible label for the button that refetches the notification list.

list.relatedTo.description: Label for the filter selecting which resource type notifications relate to.

list.any.description: Filter option meaning no resource-type restriction (any resource type).

list.nameOrKey.description: Label for the filter input matching a related resource by its name or identifier key.

list.nameOrKeyPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the related-resource name/key filter input.

list.includeSeen.description: Checkbox label to include already-seen notifications in the list.

list.includeSeenAria.description: Accessible label for the 'include seen notifications' checkbox.

list.includeArchived.description: Checkbox label to include archived notifications in the list.

list.includeArchivedAria.description: Accessible label for the 'include archived notifications' checkbox.

list.selectAllAria.description: Accessible label for the checkbox that selects/deselects all visible notifications.

list.selectedCount.description: Count of currently selected notifications in the bulk-action toolbar. {count} = number selected.

list.markSeen.description: Bulk-action button label to mark the selected notifications as seen.

list.markUnseen.description: Bulk-action button label to mark the selected notifications as unseen.

list.archive.description: Bulk-action button label to archive the selected notifications.

list.restore.description: Bulk-action button label to restore the selected notifications from archive.

list.markAllSeen.description: Button that marks all notifications (matching the current filter) as seen.

list.loading.description: Loading indicator shown while the notification list is being fetched. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

list.empty.description: Empty-state message shown when there are no notifications to display.

list.loadingMore.description: Text shown at the bottom of the list while fetching the next page of notifications. Includes a trailing ellipsis.

item.selectAria.description: Accessible label for the checkbox selecting a single notification row. {title} = the notification's title.

item.markSeenAria.description: Accessible label for the per-row button that marks a notification as seen.

item.markUnseenAria.description: Accessible label for the per-row button that marks a notification as unseen.

item.archiveAria.description: Accessible label for the per-row button that archives a notification.

item.restoreAria.description: Accessible label for the per-row button that restores a notification from archive.

errors.markSeen.description: Error toast title when marking a notification as seen fails.

errors.markUnseen.description: Error toast title when marking a notification as unseen fails.

errors.archive.description: Error toast title when archiving a notification fails.

errors.restore.description: Error toast title when restoring a notification from archive fails.

errors.markAllSeen.description: Error toast title when marking all notifications as seen fails.

resourceTypes.user.description: Label for the 'user' related-resource type (filter dropdown + notification footer badge).

resourceTypes.domain.description: Label for the 'domain' related-resource type (filter dropdown + notification footer badge).

resourceTypes.wallet.description: Label for the 'wallet' related-resource type (filter dropdown + notification footer badge).

resourceTypes.order.description: Label for the 'order' related-resource type (filter dropdown + notification footer badge).

resourceTypes.order_item.description: Label for the 'order item' related-resource type (filter dropdown + notification footer badge).

resourceTypes.payment.description: Label for the 'payment' related-resource type (filter dropdown + notification footer badge).

resourceTypes.cart.description: Label for the 'cart' related-resource type (filter dropdown + notification footer badge).

resourceTypes.dns_record.description: Label for the 'DNS record' related-resource type (filter dropdown + notification footer badge).
